input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.3.4.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ev.3.4.1
            TITLE: a violation occurs when one or two of these exist:

            CONTENT:
            rule EV.3.4.1: A Violation occurs when one or two of these exist:
EV.3.4.1 A Violation occurs when one or two of these exist: 
a. Use of more than the specified maximum power  EV.3.3.1 
b. Exceed the maximum voltage  EV.3.3.2 
for one or both conditions:  
• Continuously for 100 ms or more  
• After a moving average over 500 ms is applied

final_answer: rule EV.3.4.1: A Violation occurs when one or two of these exist: EV.3.4.1 A Violation occurs when one or two of these exist: a. Use of more than the specified maximum power EV.3.3.1 b. Exceed the maximum voltage EV.3.3.2 for one or both conditions: • Continuously for 100 ms or more • After a moving average over 500 ms is applied
